title: Medieval and Co.
description: A medieval themed modpack with a fantasy undertone
body:
# Medieval and Co.
A medieval themed modpack with (not so) subtle fantasy undertones.

-------------

## RP ready
Origins and origins classes, combined with a multitude of other role/class mods allow for a small bit of roleplay between friends

-------------

## Multiplayer optimized
With added proximity voice chat and built in "server" hosting (through e4mc) this modpack is multiplayer ready.

-------------

## Optimization first, second and third.
Loaded through forge with minimal sideloaded fabric projects to mainting solid performance even on older machines.
